interaction_log.prompt: Help me structure a 4-page report with sections: paper summary, reproduction setup and result, ablation findings, failure mode. What order and approximate length per section?
interaction_log.response_summary: Used for writing assistance: suggested order and rough paragraph counts. I wrote the actual content of each section (summary, reproduction, ablations, failure) myself, using our real results and my own explanations.
interaction_log.student_modification: No code. I wrote the report.tex content; the LLM only helped with structure. All substantive content (paper summary, reproduction commentary, ablation findings, failure explanation) is mine.

interaction_log.prompt: Add TikZ block diagram for two-pouch PLTM and for entangled vs tree in LaTeX report.
interaction_log.response_summary: Used for writing assistance: provided TikZ code for PLTM tree and entangled-vs-tree diagrams. I integrated them into report.tex and adjusted labels/captions; the narrative around the figures is my own.
interaction_log.student_modification: I adapted the diagrams to our setting (Y1, Y2, Pouch 1/2, X0–X3) and wrote the captions. Figure references and report flow are mine.
